meaning: adj.阿富汗的,阿富汗人的n.阿富汗人,阿富汗语,一种毛毯
examples: They fought as volunteers with the Afghan guerrillas.
The Afghan authorities say the airport had been closed for more than a year.

Meema, well, Meema crochets a mean Afghan and uses a secret ingredient in her chicken soup.
